I used to walk to the same bakery every morning.
She used to live in a small town.
We used to study together until midnight.
I used to feel homesick all the time.
You know, this street reminds me of my old neighborhood back then.
Oh yeah? What was your life like back then?
Very quiet. I used to walk to a little bakery every morning. I really miss it.
I know that feeling. I used to live in a small town too. I have fond memories of it.
Really? Was it hard to adjust when you moved?
At first, yes. I used to feel lost all the time. But eventually, this city became home.
That is exactly it. Nowadays my lifestyle is so different, but I have fond memories of both places.
Same here. Sometimes I look back and feel nostalgic, but I would not change a thing.
Back then, my life used to be very different.
I used to feel homesick, but eventually I adjusted.
Nowadays, my lifestyle is much busier.
This song reminds me of home and makes me nostalgic.
When I look back, I have fond memories of both places.

People who meet me now think I have always lived like this, but my life used to be completely different. Back then, I used to live in a small town where everybody knew my name. I used to walk everywhere, and I never used to lock my front door. When I moved to the city, everything felt strange. I used to get lost almost every day, and honestly, I used to feel very homesick. Little by little, though, I started to adjust. I found a coffee shop I liked, I learned the bus routes, and eventually the noise of the city started to feel normal. Nowadays, I actually love my busy lifestyle. But sometimes, when I look back, I feel a little nostalgic, and I have very fond memories of that quiet little town.

Hi Ana Paula, it is Sarah! I was cleaning out an old box today, and I found a photo of us from our first year of college. It reminded me of everything, and I got so nostalgic! Do you remember how we used to study together until midnight, and how we used to complain about every single exam? Back then, I used to think those were the hardest days of my life. Nowadays, I actually look back and miss them. My lifestyle is so different now; I used to have all the time in the world, and now my days are completely full. Anyway, it made me realize how much has changed. Tell me: what do you miss most about the way things used to be? Call me back when you can. Bye!

Back then, before I moved, my life used to be very simple. Every morning, I used to walk to the same little bakery. When I first arrived in the new city, I used to feel homesick and lost. Little by little, I started to adjust to my new lifestyle. Nowadays, I look back on those first days and feel a little nostalgic.
